name: Vernusylph of the Thawing Mountains
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>山</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>と<ruby lang="jp"><rb>雪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>解</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>春</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はる</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>化</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>け</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>精</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Vernalizer Fairy of the Mountains and Thawing
desc: You can discard this card, and 1 monster or "Vernusylph" card; draw 1 card, then you can Special Summon 1 EARTH monster from your GY, also you cannot activate non-EARTH monster effects for the rest of this turn. You can target 1 "Vernusylph" monster you control; it can make a second attack during each Battle Phase this turn. You can only use each effect of "Vernusylph of the Thawing Mountains" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can discard this card, and 1 monster or "Vernusylph" card; draw 1 card, then you can Special Summon 1 EARTH monster from your GY, also you cannot activate non-EARTH monster effects for the rest of this turn. You can target 1 "Vernusylph" monster you control; it can make a second attack during each Battle Phase this turn. You can only use each effect of "Vernusylph of the Thawing Mountains" once per turn.
eff: You can discard this card, and 1 monster or "Vernusylph" card; draw 1 card, then you can Special Summon 1 EARTH monster from your GY, also you cannot activate non-EARTH monster effects for the rest of this turn. You can target 1 "Vernusylph" monster you control; it can make a second attack during each Battle Phase this turn. You can only use each effect of "Vernusylph of the Thawing Mountains" once per turn.

mst: Prevents activation of your Effect Monsters
